subject: [SO-SDC] Optimize configuration
commit_message:
[SO-SDC] Optimize configuration

Change hikari configuration and SDC cassandra consistency, add cache
Issue-ID: OOM-2745
Signed-off-by: Samuel Liard <samuel.liard@orange.com>
Change-Id: I8bcc5fb5a8e7cdac9aa9877fd21799cb16cd4bdc

Patch Set 12:

SDC optimization seems to be good
without the tuning =>https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/weekly/onap_weekly_pod4_honolulu/2021-05/27_10-47/stability/results_sdc_5_24h/onaptests_bench.html.gz
with the tuning => https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/weekly/onap_weekly_pod4_master/2021-05/28_22-58/stability/results_sdc_5_24h/onaptests_bench.html.gz

several runs could confirm..

for the SO it is the opposite
the tuning seems to improve the results in short term (duration)
but it leads to an unrecoverable error on SO? side after a while
without the tuning => https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/weekly/onap_weekly_pod4_honolulu/2021-05/27_10-47/stability/results_instantiation_10_24h/onaptests_bench.html.gz
with the tuning => https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/weekly/onap_weekly_pod4_master/2021-05/28_22-58/stability/results_instantiation_10_24h/onaptests_bench.html.gz

JIRA has been created for instantiation stability test
JIRA already exists for onboarding stability test

We can give some time to retry to confirm
but I would suggest to merge the SDC/cassandra stuff and wait for MAria
assuming that the issue may be due to teh divergence between honolulu and master and not related to the tuning...

Patch Set 13:

SDC 1.9.0 changed directory structure with the use of integration dockers, so it broke the patch
We've kept the variables aligned so this should make the test patch more robust.

Working on exposing these settings to the chart, so do not merge this, I hope this can still be used for testing in the stability tests, as I understood from Morgan's comment that this is picked up during test
